title: botrychium mormo
intro: Botrychium mormo, also known as Slender Lip fern, is a rare and unique type of fern native to North America, characterized by its slender fronds and distinctive lip-shaped leaflets. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Botrychium mormo include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling and pain, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Botrychium mormo include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
